checklist.title: What to include in your request

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.subtitle: How we handle data from agencies, users, and operations within Vibook.

section1.title: 1. Data we process
section1.body: We process user identity data, operational information from agencies, and activity logs needed to deliver the service and improve the user experience.

section2.title: 2. Purpose of processing
section2.body: We use the information for authentication, platform operation, technical support, and aggregated product performance metrics.

section3.title: 3. Inquiries and rights
section3.bodyPrefix: For privacy inquiries or data access/update requests, write to

contact.title: Sales contact
contact.subtitle: Schedule a demo or get answers about plans, implementation, and integrations.

channels.title: Sales channels
channels.implementation: Guided onboarding for agencies and sales teams.

next.title: Recommended next step
next.body: If you already have access, sign in and review the product from inside.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.subtitle: General conditions for using the Vibook platform.

section1.title: 1. Scope of the service
section1.body: Vibook provides commercial and operational management tools for travel agencies. Access may vary based on the plan and the wholesaler or agency configuration.

section2.title: 2. Use responsibility
section2.body: Each account is responsible for the use of its credentials, the accuracy of submitted information, and compliance with applicable regulations for commercial and fiscal operation.

section3.title: 3. Support and availability
section3.body: Support and availability levels may depend on the plan and specific commercial agreements. For tailored conditions, contact the sales team.
